title: Replenishment
description: Replenishment helps you configure and manage stock replenishment for items.

replenishment_configuration_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the replenishment configuration. This is used as an identifier.

item_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the item.

unit.description: Unit of measurement for the item.

location_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the location.

status.description: Status of the replenishment configuration. Allowed values: active and paused.

pause_till_date.description: Date until which the replenishment configuration is paused.

type.description: Mode in which replenishment tasks are generated. Allowed values: auto and manual.

order_type.description: Type of order generated for the replenishment configuration. Allowed values: purchase_order and transfer_order.

trigger.description: Trigger that determines when an automatic replenishment task is generated.

trigger_frequency.description: Frequency at which the replenishment task is triggered, expressed in the units specified by trigger_frequency_period.

trigger_frequency_period.description: Period for the trigger frequency. Allowed values: day, week, and month.

reorder_level.description: Stock level at which a replenishment task is generated for the item.

max_stock_level.description: Maximum stock level to be maintained for the item at the location.

order_multiple.description: Quantity multiple to which the replenishment quantity is rounded off.

max_order_quantity.description: Maximum quantity that can be ordered in a single replenishment task.

min_order_quantity.description: Minimum quantity that must be ordered in a single replenishment task.

preferred_vendor_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the preferred vendor.

preferred_location_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the preferred source location from which stock is replenished.

preferred_location_name.description: Name of the preferred source location from which stock is replenished.

preferred_location_status.description: Status of the preferred source location.

location_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the location.

replenishment_configuration.description: Replenishment configuration associated with the location.

item_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the item.

sku.description: Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the item.

vendor_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the preferred vendor of the item.

vendor_name.description: Name of the preferred vendor of the item.

locations.description: List of associated locations and their replenishment configurations for the item.

order_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the order created from the replenishment configuration.

order_number.description: Number of the order created from the replenishment configuration.

order_type.description: Type of the order. Allowed values: purchase_order and transfer_order.

replenishment_task_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the replenishment task. This is used as an identifier.

entry_number.description: Entry number of the replenishment task.

item_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the item.

unit.description: Unit of measurement for the item.

location_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the location.

reorder_level.description: Stock level at which the replenishment task was generated for the item.

max_stock_level.description: Maximum stock level configured for the item at the location.

stock_available_for_sale.description: Stock available for sale at the location when the replenishment task was generated.

stock_yet_to_be_received.description: Stock that has been ordered but is yet to be received at the location when the replenishment task was generated.

stock_in_transit.description: Stock that is in transit to the location when the replenishment task was generated.

total_available_stock.description: Total available stock for the item at the location when the replenishment task was generated.

quantity_to_replenish.description: Quantity that needs to be replenished for the item at the location.

task_status.description: Status of the replenishment task. Allowed values: pending, replenished, completed, and dismissed.

sku.description: Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the item.

order_multiple.description: Quantity multiple to which the replenishment quantity is rounded off.

max_order_quantity.description: Maximum quantity that can be ordered in a single replenishment task.

min_order_quantity.description: Minimum quantity that must be ordered in a single replenishment task.

order_type.description: Type of order generated for the replenishment task. Allowed values: purchase_order and transfer_order.

preferred_vendor_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the preferred vendor.

source_location_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the source location from which stock is replenished.

source_location_name.description: Name of the source location from which stock is replenished.

source_warehouse_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the source warehouse from which stock is replenished. Applicable only when multi-warehouse is enabled for the organization.

source_warehouse_name.description: Name of the source warehouse from which stock is replenished. Applicable only when multi-warehouse is enabled for the organization.

source_warehouse_status.description: Status of the source warehouse. Applicable only when multi-warehouse is enabled for the organization.

current_stock_available_for_sale.description: Current stock available for sale at the location.

current_stock_yet_to_be_received.description: Current stock that has been ordered but is yet to be received at the location.

current_stock_in_transit.description: Current stock that is in transit to the location.

stock_from_draft_replenishment_purchase_.description: Stock from draft replenishment purchase orders for the item at the location.

stock_from_draft_replenishment_transfer_.description: Stock from draft replenishment transfer orders for the item at the location.

is_stock_updated.description: Indicates whether the stock figures shown for the task reflect the latest available values.

comment_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the comment.

commented_by_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the user who added the comment.

commented_by.description: Name of the user who added the comment.

comment_type.description: Type of the comment. Allowed values: system and user.

date.description: Date on which the comment was added.

date_with_time.description: Date and time at which the comment was added.

date_description.description: Human-readable description of when the comment was added.

time.description: Time at which the comment was added.

purchase_order_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the purchase order associated with the replenishment task.

vendor_name.description: Name of the vendor on the purchase order.

transfer_order_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the transfer order associated with the replenishment task.

to_location_name.description: Name of the destination location to which stock is transferred.

from_location_name.description: Name of the source location from which stock is transferred.

replenishment_task_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the replenishment task. This is used as an identifier.

entry_number.description: Entry number of the replenishment task.

item_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the item.

sku.description: Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the item.

reorder_level.description: Stock level at which the replenishment task was generated for the item.

max_stock_level.description: Maximum stock level configured for the item at the location.

max_order_quantity.description: Maximum quantity that can be ordered in a single replenishment task.

min_order_quantity.description: Minimum quantity that must be ordered in a single replenishment task.

preferred_location_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the preferred source location from which stock is replenished.

preferred_location_name.description: Name of the preferred source location from which stock is replenished.

stock_available_for_sale.description: Stock available for sale at the location when the replenishment task was generated.

quantity_to_replenish.description: Quantity that needs to be replenished for the item at the location.

date.description: Date on which the replenishment task was created.

date_with_time.description: Date and time at which the replenishment task was created.

comments.description: List of comments associated with the replenishment task.

purchase_orders.description: List of purchase orders associated with the replenishment task.

transfer_orders.description: List of transfer orders associated with the replenishment task.

entry_number.description: Entry number of the replenishment task.

item_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the item.

sku.description: Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the item.

warehouse_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the warehouse at which the replenishment task is recorded. Applicable only when multi-warehouse is enabled for the organization.

warehouse.description: Name of the warehouse at which the replenishment task is recorded. Applicable only when multi-warehouse is enabled for the organization.

location_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the location at which the replenishment task is recorded.

source_warehouse_id.description: Unique ID generated by the server for the source warehouse from which stock is replenished. Applicable only when multi-warehouse is enabled for the organization.

source_warehouse_name.description: Name of the source warehouse from which stock is replenished. Applicable only when multi-warehouse is enabled for the organization.

replenishment_configuration_id.description: Unique ID of the replenishment configuration. Provide this to update an existing replenishment configuration for the item and location combination.

item_id.description: Unique ID of the item for which the replenishment configuration is being created.

location_id.description: Unique ID of the location for which the replenishment configuration is being created.

warehouse_id.description: Unique ID of the warehouse for which the replenishment configuration is being created. Applicable only when multi-warehouse is enabled for the organization.

status.description: Status of the replenishment configuration. Allowed values: active and paused.

type.description: Mode in which replenishment tasks are generated. Allowed values: auto and manual.

order_type.description: Type of order generated by the replenishment configuration. Allowed values: purchase_order and transfer_order.

trigger.description: Trigger that determines when an automatic replenishment task is generated.

trigger_frequency.description: Frequency at which the replenishment task is triggered, expressed in the units defined by the trigger.

reorder_level.description: Stock level at which a replenishment task is generated for the item.

max_stock_level.description: Maximum stock level to be maintained for the item at the location.

min_order_quantity.description: Minimum quantity that must be ordered in a single replenishment task.

preferred_vendor_id.description: Unique ID of the preferred vendor from which stock is replenished.

preferred_location_id.description: Unique ID of the preferred source location from which stock is replenished.

preferred_warehouse_id.description: Unique ID of the preferred source warehouse from which stock is replenished. Applicable only when multi-warehouse is enabled for the organization.

replenishment_configurations.description: List of replenishment configurations to update. Each entry specifies the values for an item and location (or warehouse) combination.
